title: anthoxanthum odoratum f. villosum
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum f. villosum, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, sweet vernal grass can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
